item.title: 🇮🇷🇦🇪 Iran Accuses UAE of Direct Military Involvement at BRICS Meeting
item.description: Iran's foreign minister accused the UAE of direct involvement in military operations against Iran during a BRICS foreign ministers meeting in New Delhi, further escalating regional tensions.

item.title: 🚢⚠️ Ship Seized Off UAE Coast Heading Toward Iranian Waters
item.description: A ship anchored off the UAE was seized and is being taken toward Iranian waters, the British navy reported, as Trump and Xi discussed the Iran conflict in Beijing.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇺🇸 Xi Warns Trump Taiwan Mishandling Could Lead to Dangerous Relations
item.description: China's President Xi Jinping told Trump that mishandling disagreements over Taiwan could push US-China relations to a "very dangerous place" during their closely watched Beijing summit.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚔️ Russia Pounds Ukraine for Third Day, Kyiv Apartment Block Flattened
item.description: Russia unleashed a third straight day of massive drone and missile attacks on Ukraine, demolishing an apartment building in Kyiv and killing at least seven people as the assault on the capital intensifies.

item.title: 🇨🇳🛢️ Xi and Trump Agree Strait of Hormuz Must Remain Open
item.description: As Trump and Xi held their Beijing summit, both leaders agreed that the Strait of Hormuz must remain open amid the Iran conflict, while a ship was reported seized near the strategic waterway.

item.title: 🇮🇷💰 Iran small businesses collapse under war and internet blackout
item.description: Prices for some goods have tripled or quadrupled within months, with at least 2 million people losing jobs as Iran economy buckles under war pressure, inflation, and internet restrictions.

item.title: 🇨🇺⚡ Cuba power grid critical as US blocks fuel shipments
item.description: Protests flared in Havana amid widespread power outages. Cuba energy minister says fuel has run out as a four-month US sanctions campaign has blocked fuel deliveries to the island.

item.title: 🇸🇦🇮🇷 Saudi Arabia floats non-aggression pact with Iran and regional states
item.description: The kingdom is modelling its framework on the 1975 Helsinki Accords, seeking to reduce tensions between regional powers as the Iran conflict continues.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia Launches Largest Drone Attack of War on Ukraine
item.description: Russia carried out its largest aerial attack over a two-day period since the war began, pounding Kyiv with hundreds of drones. An apartment building was flattened, killing at least 7 civilians as strikes continued for a third straight day.

item.title: 🚢 Ship Seized Near Strait of Hormuz as Tensions Escalate
item.description: A vessel anchored off the UAE coast was seized by unauthorized personnel and is heading toward Iranian waters, according to British military reports. The incident comes as another ship was sunk in the region, raising fears of wider conflict in the critical waterway.

item.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan Urges China to End Military Pressure After Trump-Xi Summit
item.description: Taiwan said nothing surprising emerged from the Trump-Xi summit in Beijing but called on China to end its military pressure on the island. Xi had warned Trump that mishandling Taiwan could push relations to a dangerous place.

item.title: 🥩 China Halts US Beef Export Licenses Hours After Approving Them
item.description: Chinese customs appeared to halt export clearances for hundreds of US beef plants just hours after Reuters reported the long-awaited licenses had been approved during the Trump-Xi summit, underscoring ongoing trade tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US House Forces Vote on Ukraine Aid, Defying Republican Leadership
item.description: A discharge petition reached 218 signatures to force a floor vote on Ukraine security aid and new Russia sanctions, bypassing Republican leadership opposition.

item.title: 🇱🇻 Latvian Prime Minister Resigns Over Ukrainian Drone Incident Handling
item.description: Prime Minister Evika Silina resigned after controversy over stray Ukrainian drones, triggering coalition collapse months before October elections.

item.title: 🏛️ Kevin Warsh Confirmed as Federal Reserve Chair Amid Inflation Crisis
item.description: Senate confirmed Kevin Warsh as Fed chair in a 54-45 vote, the most partisan ever for a Fed chair, as oil-driven inflation intensifies from the Iran war.

item.title: 💰 IMF Team to Review Ukraine's $8.1 Billion Loan Program
item.description: International Monetary Fund staff will visit Ukraine in coming weeks to assess reform progress and tax base expansion under the wartime loan program.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Lebanon Demands Israeli Ceasefire at Washington Talks
item.description: Lebanese officials are pressing for an Israeli ceasefire in Washington talks as the US-brokered truce falters and April 17 ceasefire nears expiration.

item.title: 🇾🇪 Yemen government and Houthis exchange over 1,600 prisoners in largest swap of conflict
item.description: The internationally recognized Yemeni government and Iran-aligned Houthis agreed to exchange more than 1,600 prisoners in the largest prisoner swap of the years-long conflict.

item.title: 🚢 Gaza-bound aid flotilla departs from Turkey with dozens of ships
item.description: An activist flotilla carrying aid to Gaza departed from southwestern Turkey. The organizers said dozens of ships are participating in the effort to break the blockade.

item.title: 🇩🇪 German intelligence agencies drop US-owned Palantir for French alternative
item.description: Germany's domestic intelligence agency chose a French data analysis system over Palantir, reflecting concerns about US-owned software in sensitive government operations.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇺🇸 China's Xi Hails "New Positioning" in Ties With US
item.description: President Xi Jinping proclaimed a recalibrated US-China relationship envisioning cooperation with measured competition, following talks with President Trump in Beijing.

item.title: 🇮🇳🇴🇲 India Condemns Attack That Sank Indian-Flagged Ship Off Oman
item.description: New Delhi called an attack that sank an Indian cargo vessel in Omani waters "unacceptable" after the ship was hit by a suspected drone or missile strike amid escalating regional tensions.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Hezbollah Drone Wounds Three Civilians in Northern Israel
item.description: A Hezbollah drone exploded inside Israel on Thursday, injuring three civilians, two of them severely, according to Israeli military and hospitals. The incident occurred ahead of a third round of direct talks.

item.title: 🇮🇷🇨🇳 Iran Allows Chinese Vessels to Transit Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Iran has begun allowing some Chinese vessels to transit through the Strait of Hormuz following an understanding over Iranian management protocols for the waterway, the semi-official Fars news agency reported Thursday.

item.title: 🌍 How the Iran War Has Reshaped the Middle East
item.description: The war that began on February 28 with a massive Israeli-U.S. bombing campaign against Iran has rocked the entire Middle East, wreaking damage to infrastructure and economies and overturning settled assumptions about regional security.
